Match optimizer: search for best caliper / pihat / score_cols

Source: R/match.R
match_optimizer.Rd

Finds parameters that minimize a balance score: number of features with SMD above max_smd plus deviation penalty for key variables. Searches over max propensity threshold, which covariates to include in matching, and caliper.

Usage

match_optimizer(
  df,
  treatment_col = "is_treatment",
  ps_col = "pihat",
  user_col = NULL,
  matching_covariates = "pihat",
  max_smd = 0.1,
  max_deviation = 0.1,
  caliper_range = c(0.01, 0.5),
  max_pihat_range = c(0.95, 0.999),
  max_iter_per_param = 5L,
  min_users_per_group = 1000L,
  smd_cols = "pihat",
  dev_cols_transformations = NULL,
  dev_factor = 1,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

df

data.frame with treatment, propensity, and covariate columns

treatment_col

name of treatment column (default "is_treatment")

ps_col

name of propensity score column (default "pihat")

user_col

optional column for counting unique users per group (default NULL)

matching_covariates

character vector; covariates to assess balance (default "pihat")

max_smd

maximum acceptable absolute SMD (default 0.1)

max_deviation

maximum acceptable deviation for key variables (default 0.1)

caliper_range

numeric vector or length-2 range for caliper search (default c(0.01, 0.5))

max_pihat_range

numeric vector or length-2 range for max propensity filter (default c(0.95, 0.999))

max_iter_per_param

number of values to try per parameter (default 5)

min_users_per_group

minimum units per group in matched set (default 1000)

smd_cols

character vector; covariates that contribute extra to score when SMD > max_smd (default "pihat")

dev_cols_transformations

named list of functions (e.g. mean) for deviation (default pihat = mean)

dev_factor

weight for deviation in score (default 1)

verbose

logical; print progress (default TRUE)

Value

data.frame; best matched sample

See also

RCausalML-package

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Basic usage
# match_optimizer(...)
} # }
